title: Trojan Economy Pallet Strapping Tools Banding Starter Kit - Contains Strapping Tensioner, Sealer, 100m Yellow Polypropylene Plastic Strapping & 50 Semi Open Strapping Seals
features: Cost-Efficiency: The Trojan Economy Packaging Strapping Kit offers a bundled solution that is more cost-effective than purchasing each component individually. You save both time and money
Comprehensive Solution: This kit provides you with all the essential tools and materials required for a complete strapping process, from tensioning to sealing
Precision and Security: The included Trojan strapping tools ensure precise tension control and reliable sealing, minimizing the risk of damage during transit
Versatility: The 12mm yellow polypropylene strapping is suitable for various packaging applications, while the steel strapping seals provide an additional layer of tamper resistance
Convenience: With everything you need in one kit, you won't have to hunt for individual components or worry about compatibility. It's a convenient, all-in-one solution
description: The Trojan Economy Strapping Kit is an all-in-one package that includes essential tools and materials to streamline your strapping process, ensuring your packages are securely bound and ready for transit. Whether you're a small business or an individual with occasional strapping requirements, this kit has everything you need for a hassle-free experience

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎1 x Strapping Tensioner, 1 x Strapping Sealer, 1 x Yellow 12mm Strapping Roll, x50 Semi Open Seals
